segments.text: Most businesses are bleeding money and they don't even know it.
And the reason is always the same one mistake.
I've seen this kill companies doing 10 million a year.
Here's what's happening. Your pricing is wrong. Not a little wrong. Catastrophically wrong.
Every dollar you leave on the table compounds. Year one you lose 100k. Year three that's 400k gone.
But here's the twist — raising prices usually increases sales. I know that sounds backwards.
We tested this across 32 businesses. Average revenue increase: 23 percent in 90 days.
The fix is three steps and takes one afternoon. Step one: audit your bottom 20 percent of clients.
Do this and your business looks completely different by Q4.
